customers.name: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer
customers.description: A consumer who uses food, grocery, convenience, and retail delivery to solve immediate local needs. Success means finding a trusted nearby option, understanding total cost and delivery time, receiving the right order reliably, and recovering quickly when something goes wrong.
careAbout: Finding relevant restaurants, grocery items, and convenience products quickly
Transparent total price, delivery fee, service fee, tip, and discount explanation
Reliable delivery promise and accurate live tracking
Order accuracy, food quality, substitution quality, and temperature
Low-effort refunds, credits, or redelivery when the order fails
winsThem: Availability-aware search and ranking across local verticals
Fast checkout with trusted payment, tipping, and delivery options
Live tracking that explains preparation and courier progress
Self-service issue resolution that is fair and fast
theirFear: Paying unexpected fees after investing time building a basket
Receiving late, cold, wrong, or missing items without a fair remedy
Losing trust because promotions, ETAs, or item availability feel unreliable

jobsToBeDone.name: Find and place a local order that feels worth the fees
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Turn a meal, grocery, convenience, or retail need into a confirmed order while balancing choice, speed, quality, and total cost.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A confirmed order with clear price, expected arrival, and confidence that the store can fulfill it.

steps.step: Choose a local mission and shortlist options
steps.description: Start from a need such as dinner, groceries, household essentials, or a repeat order and narrow choices by relevance, delivery time, fees, and quality.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Local Commerce Home
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Routes consumers into relevant verticals, reorder paths, offers, and nearby availability.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Search, Browse & Ranking
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ranks stores and items using local availability, distance, quality, fees, and delivery promise.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Reorder & Recommendation Engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces replenishment and repeat-order candidates when the consumer wants speed.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer JTBD step 1: Choose a local mission and shortlist options
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 1 of the job "Find and place a local order that feels worth the fees": Choose a local mission and shortlist options.

steps.description: Inspect menu or item details, substitutions, ratings, modifiers, and total basket economics before checkout.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Storefront, Menu & Item Detail
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows store, menu, item, option, allergen, and substitution detail.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Ratings, Reviews & Quality Signals
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Gives quality and reliability evidence before purchase.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Basket & Substitution Planner
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Maintains basket, modifiers, substitutions, fees, and unavailable-item handling.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer JTBD step 2: Build a basket with confidence
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 2 of the job "Find and place a local order that feels worth the fees": Build a basket with confidence.

steps.step: Check out and trust delivery progress
steps.description: Pay, tip, apply membership or offers, and track preparation, pickup, and dropoff without needing support.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Checkout, Payments & Tipping
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Completes payment with clear fees, discounts, tip, address, and delivery options.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Membership & Subscription Benefits
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Explains and applies member benefits where they improve value.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Live Tracking & Notifications
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows order state, courier progress, and exceptions in real time.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer JTBD step 3: Check out and trust delivery progress
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 3 of the job "Find and place a local order that feels worth the fees": Check out and trust delivery progress.

jobsToBeDone.name: Recover from an order problem without losing trust
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Resolve a late, missing, wrong, damaged, or unsafe order with clear policy, fair compensation, and minimal manual effort.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A fair resolution that preserves the consumer's willingness to order again.

steps.description: Use order state, tracking, receipts, and item-level issue reporting to identify the defect.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Order Management & State Machine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides the canonical order lifecycle and exception state.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Live Tracking & Notifications
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Explains preparation, courier, delay, and dropoff events.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer JTBD step 1: Understand what happened
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 1 of the job "Recover from an order problem without losing trust": Understand what happened.

steps.description: Request refund, credit, redelivery, or escalation through self-service flows first.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Customer Care & Issue Resolution
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Applies issue policies and routes support cases when self-service is insufficient.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Fraud, Abuse & Policy Controls
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Protects legitimate consumers while limiting refund and promotion abuse.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer JTBD step 2: Get a fair remedy
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 2 of the job "Recover from an order problem without losing trust": Get a fair remedy.

media.alt: Enterprise infographic for the job "Recover from an order problem without losing trust" for customer "Everyday Local Ordering Consumer".

customerJourneyStories.name: Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery
customerJourneyStories.summary: A consumer opens the app for dinner, chooses a restaurant based on ETA, fees, and quality, tracks the courier, and uses self-service if an item is missing.

stages.narrative: The consumer has an immediate need and limited time to cook, shop, or compare many options.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 1: Trigger
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 1 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Trigger.

stages.narrative: They scan nearby stores, cuisine, delivery time, fees, offers, ratings, and repeat-order suggestions.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 2: Discovery
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 2 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Discovery.

stages.narrative: They inspect menu details, item modifiers, delivery promise, and total price before committing.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 3: Evaluation
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 3 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Evaluation.

stages.narrative: They test whether checkout is transparent enough to justify delivery fees and service fees.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 4: Trial
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 4 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Trial.

stages.narrative: They follow preparation, pickup, route, and dropoff updates and expect timely exception messages.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 5: Engagement
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 5 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Engagement.

stages.narrative: A reliable delivery and fair issue recovery keep the platform as the default local ordering option.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer journey stage 6: Retention
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 6 of "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery": Retention.

media.title: Everyday Local Ordering Consumer customer journey: Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery
media.alt: Enterprise journey storyboard for "Weeknight dinner from discovery to recovery" for customer "Everyday Local Ordering Consumer".

top.name: High-intent order conversion
top.description: Increase the share of high-intent sessions that become completed local delivery orders.

children.name: Search-to-storefront rate
children.description: Share of high-intent search or browse sessions that reach a store or item detail surface.

children.name: Fee clarity score
children.description: Share of surveyed consumers saying fees, discounts, tip, and total price were clear before checkout.

children.name: On-time delivery promise adherence
children.description: Share of completed orders delivered within the consumer-visible promised window.

children.name: Self-service resolution satisfaction
children.description: Share of issue cases resolved through self-service with a positive satisfaction signal.

top.name: Monthly order frequency per active consumer
top.description: Increase repeat local commerce usage by improving reliability, value, and multi-vertical relevance.

children.name: 90-day active consumer retention
children.description: Share of consumers with a completed order who place another order within 90 days.

children.name: Multi-vertical adopter share
children.description: Share of active consumers using more than one delivery vertical in the quarter.

children.name: Contribution margin per order
children.description: Net contribution after consumer incentives, courier costs, support, payment, and variable operations.

children.name: Membership order share
children.description: Share of completed orders placed by active subscription members.

customers.name: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator
customers.description: A restaurant, grocery, convenience, pharmacy, or local retail operator using the marketplace to acquire demand, grow order volume, manage digital operations, and preserve margins.
careAbout: Incremental profitable orders rather than channel conflict
Clear commission, ads, promotion, and payout economics
Accurate menus, prices, availability, and POS integration
Predictable courier pickup and manageable prep-time expectations
Useful reporting that explains demand, defects, and customer behavior
winsThem: Self-service catalog, promotion, ads, and reporting tools
Reliable order injection into existing operations
Quality controls that reduce cancellations and refund disputes
theirFear: Paying commissions and ads without incremental sales
Operational chaos from inaccurate prep times, substitutions, or courier timing
Unclear payouts, disputed refunds, or margin leakage

jobsToBeDone.name: Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Turn a local store into a reliable digital storefront with accurate catalog, operational controls, and clear economics.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A live store that receives incremental orders, maintains quality, and reconciles payouts cleanly.

steps.step: Become eligible and launch the store
steps.description: Complete contract, compliance, bank, tax, catalog, delivery-zone, and operating-hour setup.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Merchant Onboarding & Compliance
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Gets the partner from lead to compliant active store.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Catalog, Menu & Assortment Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Publishes the menu or retail assortment with correct modifiers, prices, and availability.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator JTBD step 1: Become eligible and launch the store
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 1 of the job "Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel": Become eligible and launch the store.

steps.description: Accept orders, manage prep time, handle substitutions, and coordinate with couriers without disrupting store operations.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Merchant Order Prep & POS Integration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects orders to tablets, POS, prep state, and handoff workflows.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Dispatch, Matching & Assignment
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Aligns courier pickup timing with store readiness.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator JTBD step 2: Operate live orders reliably
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 2 of the job "Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel": Operate live orders reliably.

steps.description: Use reporting, promotions, and ads to increase profitable demand without losing control of discounts.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Merchant Promotions & CRM
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Lets merchants target promotions with budget controls.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Sponsored Listings & Retail Media
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates paid discovery and measurable demand generation.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Merchant Analytics & Insights
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Explains sales, defects, customer behavior, ads, and payout performance.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator JTBD step 3: Improve channel economics
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 3 of the job "Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel": Improve channel economics.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator JTBD infographic: Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for the job "Launch and operate a profitable marketplace channel" for customer "Restaurant and Local Retail Operator".

customerJourneyStories.name: Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand
customerJourneyStories.summary: A restaurant completes onboarding, integrates menus and POS, tunes prep operations, then uses promotions and ads to grow incremental orders.

stages.narrative: The operator wants incremental demand, a new delivery channel, or a stronger presence versus competitors.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator journey stage 1: Trigger
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 1 of "Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand": Trigger.

stages.narrative: They compare commission, reach, ads tools, POS support, and expected customer volume.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator journey stage 2: Discovery
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 2 of "Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand": Discovery.

stages.narrative: They verify economics, launch effort, payout timing, and operational fit.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator journey stage 3: Evaluation
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 3 of "Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand": Evaluation.

stages.narrative: They launch selected menu items and monitor cancellations, prep time, quality, and first orders.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator journey stage 4: Trial
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 4 of "Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand": Trial.

stages.narrative: They improve catalog, promotions, ads, and operational staffing based on marketplace reporting.

media.title: Restaurant and Local Retail Operator journey stage 5: Engagement
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 5 of "Restaurant launches and scales delivery demand": Engagement.

stages.narrative: They stay active when incremental demand and settlement clarity outweigh commissions and operational cost.

top.name: Merchant profitable order growth
top.description: Increase active merchant order growth while keeping operational defects and margin leakage controlled.

children.name: Time to first live order
children.description: Median days from signed partner to first completed order.

children.name: Catalog accuracy at launch
children.description: Share of newly launched stores with no critical catalog or pricing defects in first seven days.

children.name: Merchant-caused cancellation rate
children.description: Share of accepted orders cancelled due to store operations, availability, or prep failure.

children.name: On-time ready-for-pickup rate
children.description: Share of orders ready within the prep-time window sent to dispatch.

top.name: Merchant revenue per active store
top.description: Increase platform revenue generated per active merchant through orders, ads, and promotion products.

children.name: Monthly orders per active store
children.description: Completed marketplace orders per active merchant store per month.

children.name: Active store retention
children.description: Share of active merchant stores that remain order-active after 90 days.

children.name: Ads adoption among eligible merchants
children.description: Share of eligible active merchants running sponsored listing or retail media campaigns.

children.name: Promotion-funded order share
children.description: Share of completed orders using merchant-funded promotion mechanics.

customers.name: Independent Courier
customers.description: An independent courier using the platform to earn flexibly by accepting delivery offers across restaurant, grocery, convenience, and retail orders.
careAbout: Reliable earnings per active hour after distance, waiting, fuel, and vehicle cost
Clear offer details before accepting work
Low waiting time at merchants and efficient routing
Fast payout, tip visibility, and understandable adjustments
Safety, fairness, and support when incidents happen
winsThem: Dispatch that minimizes dead miles and waiting
Accurate merchant readiness and route guidance
Fast payout and clear dispute handling
theirFear: Spending time online without enough profitable offers
Being penalized for merchant delays or bad batching decisions
Not understanding pay, tips, adjustments, or account actions

jobsToBeDone.name: Earn predictably during a delivery session
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Choose when and where to work, accept good offers, complete deliveries efficiently, and understand earnings.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A delivery session with predictable earnings, low friction, and few avoidable delays.

steps.step: Get access to the right work
steps.description: Complete onboarding, go online in a zone, and see demand and incentives.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Courier Onboarding & Work Access
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Confirms eligibility, documents, and market access.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Courier Availability & Incentives
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows zones, demand, boosts, and work opportunities.

media.title: Independent Courier JTBD step 1: Get access to the right work
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 1 of the job "Earn predictably during a delivery session": Get access to the right work.

steps.description: Accept clear offers, navigate to pickup, wait less, deliver accurately, and handle customer handoff.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Dispatch, Matching & Assignment
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Matches courier supply to orders with fair and efficient assignments.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Routing, Geospatial & ETA
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides route, ETA, address, and travel-time guidance.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Batching & Multi-Stop Optimization
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Combines orders where it improves utilization without breaking promises.

media.title: Independent Courier JTBD step 2: Complete offers efficiently
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 2 of the job "Earn predictably during a delivery session": Complete offers efficiently.

steps.description: See base pay, tips, boosts, adjustments, payout timing, and safety or support options.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Courier Earnings & Payout Experience
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Explains earnings and enables payout workflows.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Courier Safety & Incident Response
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides incident reporting and emergency support.

media.title: Independent Courier JTBD step 3: Understand pay and resolve issues
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for step 3 of the job "Earn predictably during a delivery session": Understand pay and resolve issues.

media.title: Independent Courier JTBD infographic: Earn predictably during a delivery session
media.alt: Enterprise infographic for the job "Earn predictably during a delivery session" for customer "Independent Courier".

customerJourneyStories.name: Courier evening earning session
customerJourneyStories.summary: A courier goes online for dinner rush, follows incentive and hotspot signals, accepts transparent offers, completes batched deliveries, and reviews payout.

stages.narrative: The courier wants flexible earnings during a time window that fits their schedule.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 1: Trigger
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 1 of "Courier evening earning session": Trigger.

stages.narrative: They check demand, zones, promotions, and expected earnings before going online.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 2: Discovery
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 2 of "Courier evening earning session": Discovery.

stages.narrative: They assess each offer based on distance, pickup, dropoff, pay, tip, and expected duration.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 3: Evaluation
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 3 of "Courier evening earning session": Evaluation.

stages.narrative: They test whether assignments, routing, and merchant readiness make the session worthwhile.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 4: Trial
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 4 of "Courier evening earning session": Trial.

stages.narrative: They complete deliveries, follow route guidance, and handle exceptions or safety issues.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 5: Engagement
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 5 of "Courier evening earning session": Engagement.

stages.narrative: They return when earnings are understandable, payouts are reliable, and support feels fair.

media.title: Independent Courier journey stage 6: Retention
media.alt: Enterprise journey panel for stage 6 of "Courier evening earning session": Retention.

media.title: Independent Courier customer journey: Courier evening earning session
media.alt: Enterprise journey storyboard for "Courier evening earning session" for customer "Independent Courier".

top.name: Courier earnings confidence
top.description: Increase courier perception that active delivery time produces predictable, understandable earnings.

children.name: Active utilization
children.description: Share of online courier time spent on accepted deliveries or active pickups/dropoffs.

children.name: Merchant wait time
children.description: Median minutes couriers wait after arriving at merchant pickup.

children.name: Earnings explanation clarity
children.description: Share of surveyed couriers saying pay, tips, incentives, and adjustments are easy to understand.

children.name: Safety incident response SLA
children.description: Share of urgent safety incidents receiving first operational response within target SLA.

top.name: Courier supply reliability
top.description: Increase reliable courier supply in priority zones while controlling incentive spend.

children.name: Peak-zone courier availability
children.description: Share of peak zone intervals with sufficient online courier supply for forecast demand.

children.name: Courier 30-day active retention
children.description: Share of active couriers completing another delivery in the following 30 days.

children.name: Courier cost per completed order
children.description: Courier pay, incentives, and adjustment cost per completed order.

children.name: Batch-eligible order share
children.description: Share of orders eligible for batching without projected lateness or quality risk.
